{{Infobox group
| name = Children
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children]] are monstrous beings created by warping human bodies.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children]] are capable of making attacks that make retrieval difficult.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s black hair rushes through a crowd of [[Children]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children]] were lunging around in the trees.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"Attacks from the Children have made retrieval difficult."<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
